requirement_topic.en: EMC — Household Refrigerating Appliances (SASO / SABER + IEC CISPR 14 series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（SASO / SABER + IEC CISPR 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（SASO / SABER + IEC CISPR 14系列）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Saudi market must satisfy the electromagnetic compatibility requirements assessed under the SASO technical regulation regime and verified through the SABER conformity-assessment platform. SASO adopts the IEC CISPR 14 series for household-appliance EMC: the primary emission standard is IEC CISPR 14-1 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission), and the immunity standard is IEC CISPR 14-2 (Part 2: Immunity — product family standard). These cover conducted and radiated disturbance limits for appliances whose mains supply frequencies are between 0 Hz and 400 Hz, including induction motors and switching electronics (relevant for modern inverter-driven compressors). EMC test data forms part of the technical file underlying the Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC); EMC compliance is demonstrated to a SASO-accepted (IECEE CB Scheme / ILAC MRA) laboratory standard rather than self-declared, and the PCoC is issued to the Saudi importer through SABER. Note the Saudi grid is 230/400 V, 60 Hz — emission/immunity test configurations must reflect the 60 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 投放沙特市场的家用制冷器具须满足在SASO技术法规制度下评定、并通过SABER合格评定平台核验的电磁兼容要求。SASO对家用器具电磁兼容采用IEC CISPR 14系列：主要发射标准为IEC CISPR 14-1（电磁兼容——家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的要求——第1部分：发射），抗扰度标准为IEC CISPR 14-2（第2部分：抗扰度——产品族标准）。上述标准涵盖电网供电频率在0 Hz至400 Hz之间的器具（包括感应电动机型及开关电子设备，与现代变频压缩机相关）的传导与辐射骚扰限值。电磁兼容检测数据构成支撑产品符合性证书（PCoC）的技术文件的一部分；电磁兼容合规须依据SASO接受的（IECEE CB体系 / ILAC MRA）实验室标准证明，而非自我声明，PCoC通过SABER签发给沙特进口商。注意沙特电网为230/400 V、60 Hz——发射/抗扰度测试配置须反映60 Hz供电。
summary.zht: 投放沙特市場的家用製冷器具須滿足在SASO技術法規制度下評定、並通過SABER合格評定平台核驗的電磁相容要求。SASO對家用器具電磁相容採用IEC CISPR 14系列：主要發射標準為IEC CISPR 14-1（電磁相容——家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的要求——第1部分：發射），抗擾度標準為IEC CISPR 14-2（第2部分：抗擾度——產品族標準）。上述標準涵蓋電網供電頻率在0 Hz至400 Hz之間的器具（包括感應電動機型及開關電子設備，與現代變頻壓縮機相關）的傳導與輻射騷擾限值。電磁相容檢測數據構成支撐產品符合性證書（PCoC）的技術文件的一部分；電磁相容合規須依據SASO接受的（IECEE CB體系 / ILAC MRA）實驗室標準證明，而非自我聲明，PCoC通過SABER簽發給沙特進口商。注意沙特電網為230/400 V、60 Hz——發射/抗擾度測試配置須反映60 Hz供電。

standards_or_laws: SASO / SABER conformity-assessment regime — EMC requirements for regulated household appliances
IEC CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (adopted via SASO)
IEC CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (adopted via SASO)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (≤ 16 A/phase input) — supplementary where applicable
IEC 61000-3-3 — Voltage fluctuations and flicker — supplementary where applicable

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity — product family standard; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) applies. These standards are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Test reports generated by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories against GB 4343.1 are not directly accepted as the basis for a Saudi Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) under the SASO/SABER regime.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度——产品族标准；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。CNAS认可的中国实验室依据GB 4343.1出具的检测报告，不被直接接受作为SASO/SABER制度下沙特产品符合性证书（PCoC）的依据。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度——產品族標準；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。CNAS認可的中國實驗室依據GB 4343.1出具的檢測報告，不被直接接受作為SASO/SABER制度下沙特產品符合性證書（PCoC）的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions ≤ 16 A/phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Because both China (GB 4343.1) and Saudi Arabia (SASO-adopted CISPR 14) ultimately derive from the IEC CISPR 14 family, the technical content gap is often limited. However, procedural gaps remain: (1) Conformity-assessment route — Saudi market access is via a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and per-shipment SCoC issued on the SABER platform to a Saudi importer, not via Chinese CCC or manufacturer self-declaration; EMC test reports must be from a SASO-accepted laboratory (commonly IECEE CB Scheme reports plus a CB certificate, or ILAC MRA-accredited reports). CNAS-only GB reports cannot substitute without acceptance by the SABER-notified body. (2) Supply-frequency configuration — the Saudi grid is 60 Hz; test data generated solely under a 50 Hz configuration may need confirmation that emission/immunity behaviour is covered for 60 Hz operation. (3) Inverter compressor models — modern refrigerators with variable-speed inverter compressors may generate additional EMC phenomena; manufacturers should verify coverage of inverter-specific emission test configurations in their existing data against the SASO-adopted CISPR 14-1 edition before test-data re-use.
gap.zh: 由于中国（GB 4343.1）和沙特（SASO采用的CISPR 14）最终均源自IEC CISPR 14族，技术内容差距通常有限。但仍存在程序性差距：（1）合格评定路径——进入沙特市场须通过SABER平台向沙特进口商签发产品符合性证书（PCoC）及每批货物的SCoC，而非通过中国CCC或制造商自我声明；电磁兼容检测报告须出自SASO接受的实验室（通常为IECEE CB体系报告加CB证书，或ILAC MRA认可的报告）。仅有CNAS的GB报告未经SABER指定机构接受不能替代。（2）供电频率配置——沙特电网为60 Hz；仅在50 Hz配置下生成的检测数据可能须确认其发射/抗扰度行为已涵盖60 Hz运行。（3）变频压缩机型号——装配变频压缩机的现代电冰箱可能产生附加电磁兼容现象；制造商在复用现有数据前，应核实其数据是否涵盖SASO采用的CISPR 14-1版本对变频专项发射测试配置的要求。
gap.zht: 由於中國（GB 4343.1）和沙特（SASO採用的CISPR 14）最終均源自IEC CISPR 14族，技術內容差距通常有限。但仍存在程序性差距：（1）合格評定路徑——進入沙特市場須通過SABER平台向沙特進口商簽發產品符合性證書（PCoC）及每批貨物的SCoC，而非通過中國CCC或製造商自我聲明；電磁相容檢測報告須出自SASO接受的實驗室（通常為IECEE CB體系報告加CB證書，或ILAC MRA認可的報告）。僅有CNAS的GB報告未經SABER指定機構接受不能替代。（2）供電頻率配置——沙特電網為60 Hz；僅在50 Hz配置下生成的檢測數據可能須確認其發射/抗擾度行為已涵蓋60 Hz運行。（3）變頻壓縮機型號——裝配變頻壓縮機的現代電冰箱可能產生附加電磁相容現象；製造商在複用現有數據前，應核實其數據是否涵蓋SASO採用的CISPR 14-1版本對變頻專項發射測試配置的要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC compliance to SASO-adopted CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) forms part of the technical file for the Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC); PCoC + per-shipment SCoC via SABER are legally required before customs clearance
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: SABER platform / Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance to SASO-adopted IEC CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) is required for Saudi market placement of household refrigerators and is assessed through the SABER PCoC/SCoC process. Chinese CCC EMC test data (GB 4343.1-2018) cannot be directly used; reports from a SASO-accepted (IECEE CB / ILAC MRA) laboratory are required, and the Saudi importer must obtain the PCoC and per-shipment SCoC. Confirm 60 Hz supply coverage and, for inverter-compressor models, CISPR 14-1 test coverage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据SASO采用的IEC CISPR 14-1（发射）和CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）的电磁兼容合规是家用电冰箱进入沙特市场的要求，并通过SABER的PCoC/SCoC流程评定。中国CCC电磁兼容检测数据（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接使用；须提供SASO接受的（IECEE CB / ILAC MRA）实验室报告，且沙特进口商须取得PCoC及每批货物的SCoC。须确认60 Hz供电覆盖情况；变频压缩机型号须确认是否符合CISPR 14-1的检测覆盖要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據SASO採用的IEC CISPR 14-1（發射）和CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）的電磁相容合規是家用電冰箱進入沙特市場的要求，並通過SABER的PCoC/SCoC流程評定。中國CCC電磁相容檢測數據（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接使用；須提供SASO接受的（IECEE CB / ILAC MRA）實驗室報告，且沙特進口商須取得PCoC及每批貨物的SCoC。須確認60 Hz供電覆蓋情況；變頻壓縮機型號須確認是否符合CISPR 14-1的檢測覆蓋要求。
